data.description:
## Why

A valid portability finding needs a productive Pass 4 response, but the proposed generic core move was rejected. The coaching behavior therefore belongs in project configuration and must remain invisible to unrelated criteria.

## What

Add the project-specific `project-portability` coaching move and focused tests for loading, applicability, and deterministic rendering.

## Scope

In scope:

- `.rebar/plan_review_moves.json`
- `tests/unit/test_project_portability_coaching.py`
- Pass 4 coaching for `project.portability` findings

Out of scope:

- generic core coaching moves
- changes to built-in move definitions
- Pass 1, Pass 2, or Pass 3 behavior
- documentation and live criterion calibration

## Approach

Use the existing project move overlay proven by the fresh-worktree experiment. Define one move with id `project-portability`, name `restore rebar portability`, and `applies_when: [project.portability]`. Its template is: `Rework {subject} so it remains portable across supported rebar client shapes; keep project-specific behavior in project configuration or an explicit extension boundary.` This is deliberately project-owned and criterion-scoped, so it cannot alter coaching for built-in or client criteria.

## Dependencies

Depends on the criterion-integration child because the move trigger must use the final activated criterion id.

## Test Strategy

Load the real project move registry, query applicability with representative trigger sets, and render the move through the normal coaching path.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The project move registry loads exactly one `project-portability` move with the name, trigger, and template specified in this plan. Prove with `.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_project_portability_coaching.py -k move_definition`.
- [ ] The move is applicable when `project.portability` is present. Prove with `.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_project_portability_coaching.py -k applies_to_portability`.
- [ ] The move is not applicable to unrelated criterion ids or an empty trigger set. Prove with `.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_project_portability_coaching.py -k ignores_unrelated_findings`.
- [ ] Rendering with a concrete subject produces the exact project-specific coaching sentence. Prove with `.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_project_portability_coaching.py -k deterministic_render`.
- [ ] No generic core move or built-in move definition is added or changed. Prove with `.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_project_portability_coaching.py -k project_owned_only`.
data.title: Add scoped portability coaching
